description: PROP-EPNS-018 (Tier 3, required: false) specifies a full workflow integration test asserting all three happy paths produce `EditingSessionState.status === 'editing'` with `currentNoteId === selectedNoteId`. No test file implements this proof obligation. The pipeline function returns `Result<EditPastNoteStartResult, SwitchError>` rather than performing the state transition itself, so verifying the final EditingSessionState requires a higher-level harness that applies the returned NewSession to the state machine. While each happy path is tested individually at the pipeline level (PROP-006/007/008), the combined assertion about post-pipeline state shape is absent.

evidence.snippet: No test matches PROP-EPNS-018 description: 'Full workflow integration — all three happy paths produce EditingSessionState.status === editing'
